source: Playwright Electron recording with phase metadata and continuous FFmpeg camera motion

demos.name: workbench-overview
demos.goal: Open a project document from the DocPilot home and confirm its Preview.
demos.outcome: README.md is active with its rendered Preview visible.

demos.name: tabs-and-panes-all-directions
demos.goal: Show document split targets and move the real Terminal Pane to every supported edge.
demos.outcome: Document and Terminal Pane placement is visibly supported on all four edges.

demos.name: quick-open-human-typing
demos.goal: Open a document with Quick open without instant scripted input.
demos.outcome: beta.md opens as the active document tab.

demos.name: project-search-complete
demos.goal: Find body text with project search and open the exact line result.
demos.outcome: docs/review.md opens from the chosen body-search result.

demos.name: asciidoc-long-cold-cache
demos.goal: Show truthful cold and cached Preview loading for a long synthetic AsciiDoc manual.
demos.outcome: The long outline and rendered manual appear, and cached reopen is visibly shorter.

demos.name: preview-navigation-width
demos.goal: Navigate a long Preview and adjust its symmetric reading width.
demos.outcome: The chosen section is visible at the adjusted centered reading width.

demos.name: diff-edit-to-changes
demos.goal: Show an actual edit followed by complete rendered Diff review.
demos.outcome: Added and removed content, Summary, and the selected changed location remain visible together.

demos.name: preview-context-to-claude
demos.goal: Transfer DocPilot Preview context into a real Claude CLI session.
demos.outcome: The copied DocPilot context is submitted in the real Claude CLI; model response is not required.

demos.name: terminal-open-session
demos.goal: Open the real Terminal Pane and run a project command at human speed.
demos.outcome: The real shell output is visible beside the document.
